title: Australian Prawn Dumpling Stir Fry
description: A delicious and easy-to-make stir fry dish featuring Australian prawns and dumplings.
instructions: Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add prawns and cook until pink and just cooked through, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove prawns from the skillet and set aside.
Add more oil if necessary and stir in ginger and garlic until fragrant.
Add dumplings to the skillet and cook until browned on the bottom, about 2-3 minutes.
Add sweet soy sauce to the skillet and stir to coat dumplings.
Return prawns to the skillet and stir to combine with dumplings and sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the stir fry to a serving platter and garnish with green onions and sesame oil.
